title: Sword For Every Really Occasion (SFERO)
description: A simple mod that adds many, many, many swords
body:
Sword For Every Really Occasion (or SFERO for easier searching) adds a handfull of new swords and ores to craft them, advancements and crafting recipes, 

The mod adds sword like a Bread (*and yes, you can Eat it*), Emerald or Glass

The mod also adds new Ores, like a Topaz, Alexandrite or Ruby

This mod was previously on CurseForge named as My Custom Super Sword, but I think that I will be now uploading over here, because it will be better for everyone.
